name: obsidian-knowledge-agent
description: A self-evolving knowledge agent for Obsidian: from a one-line capture to a full course build, for any subject. Matches structure to the material, fits your vault, and learns your conventions from every run.

plugins.name: obsidian-knowledge
plugins.description: Self-evolving knowledge agent for Obsidian. From a quick capture to a full course build, for any subject — it matches structure to the material, fits your vault's conventions, writes notes that teach, and reflects on each run to improve its own rules.
